summary:
Perfect! ✓ Fixed. The issue was that `UserV2` was missing three backward-compatibility fields from `UserV1`:
- `avatar_url`
- `bio`
- `location`

These fields were removed during the v2 refactor, breaking backward compatibility. I added them back to the struct and updated the `ToV2()` conversion method. The test now passes with all v1 fields present in v2, plus the new v2-specific fields.
